behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted paths (clippy.toml, scripts/clippy-lint.sh, AGENTS.md, etc.) and literal strings ('cargo clippy --all-targets', 'Merge without running clippy', 'CI handles this (clippy)', 'too-many-lines-threshold', 'clippy.toml') are explicitly stated in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (remove scripts, create clippy.toml, decompose function) without giving exact code or line-by-line edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check structural properties (function count >=10, body <200 lines, >=3 calls) without naming specific helper functions, and string assertions match the explicit literal requirements stated in instruction.md.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo fmt, cargo check, cargo clippy as subprocesses to verify the build still works, beyond just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual file deletions, file creations with valid content, and a function decomposition that compiles and passes clippy --all-targets, which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors required by instruction (file removal, clippy.toml, doc updates with specific strings, function decomposition) are tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, static checks) and have descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and commands match across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to update because the task is explicitly about updating documentation files; localization is not part of the challenge.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch makes localized edits to specific lines in each config/doc file rather than full rewrites.
